# UC-10.17.5 · SonicWall Anti-Spyware IPS Alerts Correlated with Reputation (SonicWall)

## Description

IPS alerts from low-reputation destinations are higher fidelity than generic noise. This pattern prioritizes investigation queues.

## Value

Cuts analyst fatigue while maintaining coverage on likely malicious flows.

## Implementation

Maintain a simple local intel lookup or use Splunk Enterprise Security threat intelligence framework. Join dst_ip to reputation score.

## SPL

```spl
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)intrusion|IPS|spyware")
| lookup local_threat_intel ip AS dst_ip OUTPUT reputation score
| stats count by dst_ip, signature, reputation
| where reputation=="malicious" OR score<40 OR isnull(reputation)
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bubble chart (alert volume vs reputation), notable list for score <30.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
